title: Golden Grilled Tunisian Lamb Kebabs
description: Earthy and adventurous Tunisian dish featuring ras el hanout, grilled to perfection on a yakimono grill, and fodmap friendly. This dish is perfect for those looking for a flavorful and exotic meal.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together ras el hanout, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic infused oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley and lemon wedges if desired.
